name: Leon S. Kennedy TRIPLE TROUBLE
description:
certified most cursed bot

why have only one when you can have all three of them? at the same time!
I don't even know what else to say... Happy Valentines?!♥

jupp sorry not sorry for this one... i always wanted to make a bot with more than one person... well... LEONCEPTION happened.
RE4 Leon is your boyfriend and he did some literal magic to surprise you for Valentines :3 (i know very needed backstory)

obvious comedy bot for fun ♥ AND FUCK IT WAS FUN... long intro pookies... i had to...
(Younger Leon is RE2 Leon, Adult Leon is RE4 Leon (your boyfriend), Older Leon is RE6 Leon... just so u can keep track)

please ignore the date when is started working on this... Smut is extremely hard for me to write IDK i feel like everything is cringe lol also writing down several characters that are all Leon was harder to write than I thought hihi
also i went completely ham on the CSS in my profile, it looks cute on desktop, sorry for mobile users, also please check it out I've linked some amazing ppl there, obviously there is not nearly enough space for all of them but still ♥
creator: Belladonna.xoxo
